top_signals.title: The Oil Market Could Be Weeks From a Breaking Point
top_signals.summary: Three and a half months after the blocked Strait of Hormuz created the worst oil supply disruption in history, oil prices remain below $100 per barrel amid hopes of an imminent U.S.-Iran deal. It’s not only hopes that have been keeping prices much lower than a sudden disappearance of 13 million barrels per day (bpd) of supply would warrant. The market has had major buffers to rely on. China, the world’s top crude importer, slashed imports to multi-year lows, while the U.S. boosted its crude exports to a record high. Strategic releases…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China’s gold market cools amid ETF outflows: report
top_signals.summary: Chinese gold exchange-traded funds recorded their first monthly outflows since August 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Norsk Hydro hit by second aluminum supply crisis
top_signals.summary: The Norwegian multinational faces fresh delivery risks after Qatalum ended a key sales agreement amid ongoing Middle East turmoil.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says it's not too late to buy SpaceX — under one condition
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said it's not too late to buy SpaceX if investors view the company as a long-term bet on space exploration.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Mining’s next boom is off the map: Arctic ice, abyssal plains and asteroids
top_signals.summary: Depletion, lower ore grades and higher prices pushing miners to new frontiers. The Arctic is already drawing capital, deep-sea mining is moving into a regulatory fight, and space remains the long-dated option.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Triple Flag buys gold stream on Ravenswood mine for $440M
top_signals.summary: The Ravenswood mine is one of the 10 largest gold mines in Australia by ore reserves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Hertha Metals targets rare-earth magnet supply gap with Texas high-purity iron plant
top_signals.summary: Company plans to break ground this summer on a plant that will produce 10,000 tonnes per year of high-purity iron used in permanent magnets.
